purpose: Product-type monorepo for interactive AI showcases, monetizable AI products, RAG systems, Unity learning demos, ML research support, and portfolio presentation.

product_priority.01_AI_Tech_Quest: Main product and interactive portfolio hub
product_priority.04_BuildFlow: Engineering contractor intake and dispatch management product connected to qingyu-web-studio
product_priority.06_ML_Experiment_Lab: Research support only, not a main product
product_priority.07_Portfolio_Website: Public website and case study hub

monorepo_structure.00_Product_Strategy: Product strategy, monetization, positioning, and case study planning
monorepo_structure.02_AI_Business_Assistant: FAQ assistant and business automation product
monorepo_structure.03_TW_Civic_RAG: Traditional Chinese RAG and source-grounded QA product
monorepo_structure.04_BuildFlow: BuildFlow contractor job intake, admin dashboard, dispatch workflow, Supabase MVP backend, and LINE Bot integration
monorepo_structure.07_Portfolio_Website: Public website, case studies, and contact layer
monorepo_structure.99_Background_Skills: Older foundation work documented outside the main product portfolio
